summary: POTUS retweet of a WhiteHouse video set to music, shot on the White House South Lawn with the Washington Monument behind. Slow-motion footage of teenagers in navy 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts doing pushups, a coach dribbling a basketball and diving for a soccer ball, and Trump with the participants, fists up. Spoken audio: 'Class is in session', 'Good job.'

script.scene: Low-angle slow-motion: a man in a suit dribbles a basketball across the South Lawn while a line of teenagers in matching navy 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts watches; the Washington Monument in the background. Music; voice: 'Class is in session.'
Wide shot of the White House lawn: Trump and an official in suits talk as a row of participants do pushups in the grass; aides and Secret Service stand by.
Slow-motion at a soccer goal: a coach in a blue shirt dives across the frame as a red, white and blue ball flies toward the net. Music.
Trump, beside a coach, a woman in white, and a staffer in an agency shirt, points and gestures toward the activity; people in the crowd point.
Trump stands in a circle of smiling teenagers in navy shirts, fists up, on the sunlit lawn. Voice: 'Good job.' Music swells.

notable_text: CLASS IS IN SESSION; THE PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS TEST IS BACK!; on-shirt text 'PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS TEST'
